creator: john@saltant.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #1)
The best I can offer is the trailing commit history of the test_vectors directory from the commit at which the version number changed [0]. While the pycryptodome-test-vectors' version number is its own, the upstream project does not maintain a separate change log for it.

[0] https://github.com/Legrandin/pycryptodome/commits/bcfd82dcd6d94abb304930ec9ab5779abd8d89ef/test_vectors
